config_files.notes: Multiplayer settings. Uses 'seta key "value"' syntax. Overwritten by the in-game settings menu. Edit only while the game is closed.
Game Pass (Xbox App) version shares the same config path as Steam and Battle.net.

keys.notes: Low shadows are the professional competitive standard in CoD. Shadows obscure player outlines in darker map areas.
Low particles improve FPS consistency during killstreaks and explosions — high-intensity moments where frame time spikes are most disruptive.
Universally disabled for competitive play — DoF blurs non-focused areas reducing visibility.
Disabling makes dark areas appear brighter and more uniform, which competitive players prefer for enemy visibility.

keys.effect: Field of view in degrees. Range 60-120.
keys.notes: BO6 introduced Omnimovement (full 360° movement). Most Omnimovement players use 100-110° FOV for the increased peripheral awareness. Default 80° is functional but limiting with the new movement system.

manual_only_settings.recommendation: DLSS Quality on RTX hardware. FSR Quality on AMD. XeSS on Intel Arc.

manual_only_settings.location: Graphics > Display > NVIDIA Reflex Low Latency
manual_only_settings.recommendation: On + Boost for NVIDIA GPU owners. Highly impactful in CoD's fast-paced multiplayer.
Disable if internet connection is slow or unstable. On-demand streaming loads higher-res textures mid-match; on poor connections, this causes visible texture pop-in.

notes: BO6 introduced Omnimovement, a significant change from previous CoD titles. FOV recommendations should account for this — 90-100° is more appropriate than the legacy 80° standard.
The Ricochet anti-cheat system in BO6 operates at the kernel level. All keys in this profile are config-file based and Ricochet-safe.
BO6 is available on Xbox Game Pass (PC). The config path is the same across all platforms (Steam, Battle.net, Game Pass) because the Activision launcher handles settings for all of them.
CoD titles are updated frequently. Config key names occasionally change between major updates. If a key has no effect, check PCGamingWiki for the current key name.
